coordinate_system: component-side board millimetres; raw-image centres are observations in PXL_20260710_200445914.jpg
promotion_rule: the .006 assembly drawing fixes the lower-row order; literal target markings distinguish the two adjacent KR1533LA3 packages, and the D36/D33 bracketing placements plus the raw-photo pitch interpolate D37 and R57 without borrowing the upper D92/D39 row

sources.role: assembly order D36, R57, D37, D33 and bottom-facing D37 notch
electrical value R57=20 ohm and D36.11-R57-CAS topology
complete lower timing row with literal D36/D37/D33 markings, R57 bands, and package/pad centres
independent upper-row overlap proving the former D37 fit is the distinct KR1533LA3 D39 immediately right of decapped D92
reflected upper-row D39 pad group formerly mislabeled D37

D37.role: lower-row NAND between R57 and D33

R46.role: photo-visible vertical RC resistor between D33 and D103

fit.method: D36/D33 linear interpolation in the same raw frame, with R46 checked between D33/D103 and D103 retained as a held-out row-order checkpoint

upper_row_reclassification.basis: the .006 drawing places D39 immediately right of D92; the registered component frame literally shows decapped D92 immediately left of this top-notched KR1533LA3, while the separate lower-row target photo literally shows the bottom-notched D37 between R57 and D33

disposition: D37/D39 physical identities and placements corrected; R57 and R46 vertical placements, lead spans, and schematic values closed; electrical nets unchanged
